positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by cascading luminous cherry blossoms and bioluminescent cosmic mist. The fox has a sleek, elegant silhouette, rendered in deep indigo, cream, and glowing gold accents. The composition is symmetrical and centralized, designed for a perfect repeating pattern feel. Style: Art Nouveau meets modern mystical graphic design, utilizing bold outlines and flat areas of color with gradients only for light effects. Lighting: Ethereal, back-lit glow emphasizing the outlines. Ideal for fabric printing, highly clean lines, high contrast, vector-art feel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, photo, realism, gradient noise, grain, distressed, signature
